records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu, what a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu, what a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu, what a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ended up peeking behind the prima donna's stage curtain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ended up peeking behind the prima donna's stage curtain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ended up peeking behind the prima donna's stage curtain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I did not expect to see you this pathetic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I did not expect to see you this pathetic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I did not expect to see you this pathetic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This look doesn't suit you at all, Swan Claire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This look doesn't suit you at all, Swan Claire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This look doesn't suit you at all, Swan Claire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Well, of course not.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Well, of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not once did I stop struggling to survive, not even for a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not once did I stop struggling to survive, not even for a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not once did I stop struggling to survive, not even for a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at me now. Even now, I'm groveling to you, calling myself your underling, just to stay alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at me now. Even now, I'm groveling to you, calling myself your underling, just to stay alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at me now. Even now, I'm groveling to you, calling myself your underling, just to stay alive.

records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, it's strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, it's strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would someone who clings so desperately to life go so far off script?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would someone who clings so desperately to life go so far off script?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would someone who clings so desperately to life go so far off script?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Going as far as to risk her own life?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Going as far as to risk her own life?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Going as far as to risk her own life?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, if I had any faith that you'd honor the deal, I wouldn't have needed to.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, if I had any faith that you'd honor the deal, I wouldn't have needed to.

records.m_Talk_DEU: My end of the contract was to bring you into reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My end of the contract was to bring you into reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To do that, I planted mirror shards in all six Grand Dimension Crevices and shattered the Ark's seal.

records.m_Talk_FRA: To do that, I planted mirror shards in all six Grand Dimension Crevices and shattered the Ark's seal.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's no guarantee you'll grant my wish in return.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So I made my own attempt to restore London, my home world.
